OpenClaw Update: How to Use the New 'By The Way' Mode

Learn how to use OpenClaw's revolutionary new "By The Way" mode to ask side questions without interrupting your AI's main tasks. This update prevents context pollution and allows for true multitasking within your AI sessions.

00:00 - Intro
00:36 - What is OpenClaw?
00:56 - Explaining By The Way Mode
02:21 - How it Works Under the Hood
03:25 - Solving Context Pollution
05:32 - BTW Mode Rules & Limits
07:00 - Normal Chat vs. BTW Mode
08:02 - AI Profit Boardroom Community
